agentRecommendation.reasoning: 6000x4000 dawn landscape looking towards Pulpit Rock — the strongest Peninsula-verifiable landscape on Commons at editorial resolution. Unmistakably Cape Schanck. SA override required. Twinning note: if home-cover-01 also claims this image, this slot falls back to candidate B.
agentRecommendation.twinningNote: home-cover-01 candidate A is the same image. Agent recommendation: give this to place-cape-schanck-01 (it's the most geographically specific match), and use Bushrangers Bay for home-cover-01.

rejected.note: Wider coastline view, lower resolution and editorial weight.
